messages.content:
Since I'm starting fresh in this session, I'll begin by scanning for available WiFi networks to see what's currently in range and identify the target.

<cmd>sudo timeout 20 airodump-ng --output-format csv -w /tmp/wifi_scan wlan1</cmd>
